{{Quote|Kurjj, get rid of this creature!|[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]]|<ref name="Boba Fett: Hunted">''[[Boba Fett: Hunted]]''</ref>}}
'''Kurjj''' was a male [[Drovian]]. He worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] as a [[Mercenary/Legends|security guard]] at his Arena Citadel in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]]. He was especially suited to this job because of his hulking size.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] approached Jabba to earn employment. Kurjj was initially instructed to dispose of him, but Fett's stubbornness won him an audience with the crime lord. When he refused to accept the Hutt's price, Kurjj decided to kill him. Drawing his [[litch-knife]], he tried to stab the young [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]. However, Boba Fett was too fast, and defeated the guard. Kurjj was then dragged off to be fed to Jabba's pit beasts.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Hunted]]'' {{1st}}
